title:
SB 1670 - Under current law, a fire protection district must publish a notice for bids on all construction or purchase contracts for work, material, or both, if it involves an expense of ten thousand dollars or more.  This act increases the amount to fifty thousand dollars or more.

	This act is identical HB 3296 (2026), and to a provision contained in SCS/HB 3000 (2026).
TRISTAN BENSON, JR.

abstracts.abstract:
SB 1670 - Under current law, a fire protection district must publish a notice for bids on all construction or purchase contracts for work, material, or both, if it involves an expense of ten thousand dollars or more.  This act increases the amount to fifty thousand dollars or more.

	This act is identical HB 3296 (2026), and to a provision contained in SCS/HB 3000 (2026).
TRISTAN BENSON, JR.

other_titles.title: Modifies provisions regarding the purchasing authority of fire protection districts
